Naval Air Warfare Center Aircraft Division - Lakehurst
Directions
From Philadelphia International Airport:
Route I-95 North to exit for Walt Whitman bridge (toll)
After bridge, follow signs to Route 295 North
Route 295 North to Exit 34 (Marlton, Route 70 East)
Stay on Route 70 East approximately 40 miles
Turn left at Route 547.
Keep left on Route 547 and proceed about 1/2 mile to main gate on left (traffic light)
From Newark Airport/Garden State Parkway Southbound:
N.J. Turnpike to Garden State Parkway South
Parkway South to Exit 89 (Lakehurst/Toms River) to Route 70 West
Follow signs on Route 70 West to Route 547 and turn right (Lakehurst Diner on right, McDonalds on left)
Keep left on Route 547 and proceed about 1/2 mile to main gate on left (traffic light)
From Philadelphia’s 30th Street Train Station:
East on Market Street to Fifth Street
Left on Fifth Street--two blocks to Ben Franklin Bridge
Cross bridge onto Admiral Wilson Blvd (Route 30 - to Cherry Hill)
2 1/2 miles on Admiral Wilson Blvd to Route 70 East
Stay on Route 70 East approximately 45 miles
Turn left at Route 547.
Keep left on Route 547 and proceed about 1/2 mile to main gate on left (traffic light)
From Trenton, NJ Train Station:
Clinton Ave to Hamilton Ave (right at 2nd light)
Hamilton Ave to next light. Turn left onto Route 129 South
Route 129 to Route 195 East (Shore Points)
Route 195 East to Exit 16B to Route 537 East
Route 537 to Route 571 (3rd light). Right onto Route 571
Route 571 to Route 547 (right at 3rd light -- Ridgeway Liquors) (Note: It's about a 20 minute drive between the 1st and 2nd lights)
Proceed to main gate on right (traffic light)
Driving to Lakehurst from Patuxent River, MD
Route 2 to Route 301 East or North
Route 301 (about 68 miles) to Route 896 East
Route 896 East (4 miles) to Route 13 North
Route 13 North (16 miles) to the Delaware Memorial Bridge
Immediately as you exit bridge, enter Route 295 North
Route 295 North (34 miles) to Marlton Exit 34A (Route 70 East)
Route 70 East for about 40 miles
Left at Route 547.
Keep left on Route 547 about 1/2 mile to main gate. Left into base at traffic light
Driving to Lakehurst from Washington, DC
Route I-95 North to the Delaware Memorial Bridge
Immediately as you exit bridge, enter Route 295 North
Route 295 North (34 miles) to Marlton Exit 34A (Route 70 East)
Route 70 East for about 40 miles
Left at Route 547.
Keep left on Route 547 about 1/2 mile to main gate. Left into base at traffic light
Note that directions may include toll roads and bridges.
